title: Debounce and Throttle Utilities
description: Implement debounce and throttle higher-order functions with support for leading/trailing edge execution and cancellation.
requirements: debounce(fn, wait, options) - delays execution until wait ms after last call
throttle(fn, wait, options) - limits execution to once per wait ms
Return wrapper with flush() method for immediate execution
Preserve 'this' context when calling wrapped function
